changes_made.change: Guide product CTA button: 'Get the Guide' → 'Get the Guide — $29'
changes_made.reason: Price was shown in hero CTA but missing from the actual product card buy button — creates friction/surprise at click. Eliminated the inconsistency.

changes_made.change: Starter Kit product CTA button: 'Get the Starter Kit' → 'Get the Starter Kit — $97'
changes_made.reason: Same issue — price missing from primary conversion button. Consistency and no price surprise at checkout.

changes_made.change: Final CTA headline: 'Ready to see what your competitors are doing?' → 'See exactly where you're losing — and fix it in 24 hours.'
changes_made.reason: Question headline at bottom of page was weaker than hero and didn't close on an outcome. New version reinforces the core value prop (exact diagnosis) and the 24hr delivery differentiator.

metric_deltas_vs_last_week.note: First week with data. No prior baseline. GSC data unavailable (no data yet per script). Stripe: $116 revenue, 4 sales in last 7 days.
